text:
Steps to reproduce: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=257622#c5

devel/netsurf-buildsystem has "BUILD_CC?=" in its files, and the ports using it are affected. See my PRs.

Also https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/porting-dads/#dads-cc
